notes: v0.16.32 — Phase 5/9: HAZARD node. New MatchMode.HAZARD — pure-dodge survival, no bot, 30s timer, bullet volleys raining from the arena edges. 3 patterns rotate: ARC (cone from a random edge aimed at you), RING (8-ish bullets from a circle around you flying inward), CHASE (lead shots aimed where you'll be in 0.4s). Cadence + shot count + bullet speed scale with rift difficulty — BRUTAL hazard is genuinely brutal, EASY is teachable. Death = -1 life (retry), survive 30s = node clear, rift advances. Windows only.
